values.value: Fires when SetupAuditTrail entries in the last 7 days reference deletion or removal of a Login IP Range. Login IP Ranges are a network-layer compensating control, so each removal is treated as a high-severity change pending review.

Open Setup > Profiles or Setup > Network Access and verify whether the removed Login IP Range was replaced by an equivalent control. If the removal was unauthorized, restore the IP range from version control or your change-management ticket. Confirm with the change author and attach the approval to the finding.
